text: Option B selected: collapse 6 store traits into single IResearchGraph backed by nanograph. Eliminates glue code, leverages open_in_memory() for tests.
Clean start for v1 — no JSON data migration required. Migration is mechanical (JSON→JSONL) and can be done later.
Architecture uplift: introduce application/use-case layer, enforce domain/infra boundary via module visibility + CI lint.
nanograph enum() syntax supports kebab-case values — needs verification against schema parser.
resolution: CONFIRMED — kebab-case enums work, auto-sorted alphabetically.

text: UUID strings as @key will work for nanograph node identity — needs verification (nanograph examples use slugs).
resolution: CONFIRMED — UUID strings as String @key work for nodes and edge resolution.

text: No automated Rust tool for detecting domain/infra layer violations. Will build lightweight CI lint (grep-based).
Feature-gate nanograph behind cargo feature flag. Binary goes from 1.4MB to 58MB (+341 deps). Default build stays lean; graph backend is opt-in.
protoc (protobuf compiler) required at build time when nanograph feature is enabled — needs CI setup.

gaps: CRAP analysis skipped — crap4ts not available for Rust
